nodes.name: Watch SFF Emails
nodes.notes: Configure IMAP credentials for the inbox that receives SFF emails. Set polling interval as needed (e.g. every 5 minutes). Filter by sender: noreply@showfilmfirst.com or similar.

nodes.name: Parse SFF Excel
nodes.notes: Reads password-protected Excel attachment using xlsx library. Requires N8N_RUNNERS_ALLOWED_MODULES=xlsx on the n8n server. Password from $env.SFF_EXCEL_PASSWORD.

nodes.name: Match Event & Session
nodes.notes: Calls a Supabase RPC function to find the matching event_id and session_id by event name and date. The RPC function needs to be created (see migration). Falls back to a direct query if RPC doesn't exist.

nodes.name: Upsert Customer to CRM
nodes.notes: Upserts the attendee into the customers CRM table. Uses Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates to match on the email unique constraint. Source is only set on insert (won't overwrite existing source for returning customers).

nodes.name: Insert Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Inserts the ticket entry. The unique index on booking_reference will reject duplicates (409 Conflict), which is expected and handled by the error handler.

nodes.name: Errors - Review Needed
nodes.notes: Add a Slack or email notification here to alert when SFF imports have errors.
